session.user:
Run prettier check on the three changed files to verify formatting: - docs/learned/architecture/inference-hoisting.md - docs/learned/cli/land-learn-integration.md - docs/learned/tui/one-shot-prompt-modal.md
Run: prettier --check docs/learned/architecture/inference-hoisting.md docs/learned/cli/land-learn-integration.md docs/learned/tui/one-shot-prompt-modal.md
Report results.
session.assistant: I'll run prettier check on those three files for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check prettier formatting on three documentation files

session.tool_result: Checking formatting... All matched files use Prettier code style!
session.assistant:
prettier passed: All three documentation files conform to Prettier code style.
